interface.shortDescription: Author Remotion video code in React with official best-practice rules for compositions, timing, assets, captions, aud...
interface.longDescription: Author Remotion video code in React with official best-practice rules for compositions, timing, assets, captions, audio, transitions, Three.js, Tailwind, HTML-in-canvas, and media measurement. Use for Remotion code, React video components, deterministic motion graphics, captions, audio visualization, SFX, composition structure, and local render checks. Use `remotion-render` when the authored Remotion code should be rendered to MP4 through inference.sh.
